title: glossanthus malabaricus
intro: Glossanthus malabaricus, also known as the Malabar glossanthus, is a plant species native to the Malabar region of India. It is a small, annual herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Glossanthus malabaricus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Glossanthus malabaricus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, and it is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
